name: Visitor Guide
tagline: Which concerts and events are open to visitors — and what you need to book to be there
vibe: You're booking independently. Use this to decide which parts of the tour to join, then let the app tell you what to book.
highlights: Concert #2 — Château de La Tour d'Aigues (Jul 31)

days.label: Departure Day — Monday, July 27
days.theme: Drop performer at BCCC → family drives to EWR → both fly out

legs.notes: Drive performer + instrument + luggage to BCCC (275 Swamp Rd, Newtown PA). Performer report time still TBD — YOBC departure-day schedule TBA; watch email the week of Jul 20.

BCCC → EWR ~1h15 via I-95/NJ Tpk (allow 1h45 for Monday-afternoon turnpike traffic). ⚠️ DECIDE: long-term airport parking (~$18-25/day x 9 days, book EWR parking or offsite lot ahead) vs. car service/dropoff by relative. Family flight departs 5:30 PM — target EWR arrival by 2:30 PM for international check-in.

segments.activity: Drop performer at BCCC — group bus takes performers to JFK (report time TBA by YOBC)
Family drives BCCC → EWR (~1h15; buffer for traffic). Park or get dropped off
Check in United international — bags, security
✈ FAMILY: United EWR → GVA nonstop departs (booked, Chase Trip 1018046263)
Performers depart JFK on AA0198

days.label: Day 1 — Tuesday, July 28
days.theme: Group arrives in Chamonix — Rehearsal day

legs.notes: ⚠️ NOT BOOKED. Options: (a) rental car from GVA French sector — RECOMMENDED, keeps flexibility for Martigny & Château concerts; (b) AlpyBus/Mountain Drop-offs shared shuttle (~€30-35 pp, ~75 min). Trains GVA→Chamonix take 2.5-3h with 2 changes — not recommended after an overnight flight.

segments.activity: Land GVA — collect car (rental NOT yet booked ⚠️)
Arrive Chamonix — drop bags at Airbnb (Cozy apartment, check-in time TBC; free parking on premises)
Explore Chamonix town — group arrives ~4 PM, rehearsal 5:30 PM (not open to visitors)

days.label: Day 2 — Wednesday, July 29 ★ Concert #1
days.theme: Aiguille du Midi + Concert at Martigny

legs.notes: ⚠️ TRANSPORT DECISION NEEDED. Car: 40 min via Col de la Forclaz (no Swiss motorway vignette needed on the pass road). Train: Mont-Blanc Express Chamonix→Martigny (~90 min, scenic) BUT concert ends ~9:30 PM and the last train back to Chamonix typically departs Martigny before 9 PM — DO NOT rely on the train for the return. Drive, or confirm late TMR/SBB times for late July.

segments.activity: Aiguille du Midi cable car — join the group (buy visitor tickets in advance in peak season ⚠️)
Drive to Martigny — free time (Fondation Gianadda worth a visit)
★ Concert #1 — Place Centrale, Martigny
Drive back to Chamonix (40 min, mountain pass at night — fill tank beforehand)

days.notes: Visitors staying in Chamonix: return independently after the concert (~40 min drive/train to Chamonix). Or stay overnight in Martigny.

days.label: Day 3 — Thursday, July 30
days.theme: Group transfers to Arles — visitors travel south

legs.notes: ⚠️ Car strongly recommended: ~4.5h drive (A40/A7 via Lyon). Train alternative is 6.5-7.5h with 2-3 changes (St-Gervais + Lyon/Avignon) — impractical with kids and bags. Arles check-in after 5 PM, secured parking on site.

segments.activity: Check out of Chamonix Airbnb — drive south
Pont du Gard stop — the group stops here too around noon
Check in Le Mas Sivan, Arles (conf HM9S8PCSBF, after 5 PM)

days.label: Day 4 — Friday, July 31 ★ Concert #2
days.theme: Les Baux + Concert at Château de La Tour d'Aigues

legs.notes: ⚠️ CAR REQUIRED — no practical public transit to La Tour d'Aigues (Luberon village). Concert 9 PM, ends ~10:30 PM; 75 min night drive back to Arles. Consider leaving Les Baux by 5 PM.

segments.activity: Les Baux-de-Provence guided tour — join the group (25 min drive)
Drive to Château de La Tour d'Aigues — dinner en route or picnic
★ Concert #2 — Château de La Tour d'Aigues
Night drive back to Arles (~75 min)

legs.notes: 45 min drive. Summer Saturday beach traffic — leave by 9 AM. No booking needed.

segments.activity: Beach day with the group — Le Grau-du-Roi
Free evening in Arles — Roman Arena, Van Gogh sites

days.label: Day 6 — Sunday, August 2 ★ Concert #3

legs.notes: BEST TRAIN DAY: TER Arles→Avignon Centre ~20 min, roughly hourly, ~€8 pp. Concert is 5 PM at Place de l'Horloge (CONFIRMED Avignon per Jul 17 YOBC email) — evening trains back to Arles run until ~10 PM, so train works both ways. Driving also fine (35 min) but Avignon intramuros parking is tight on summer Sundays. ⚠️ Verify Sunday TER schedule ~1 week out; buy on SNCF Connect.

segments.activity: Pont Saint-Bénézet + Palais des Papes with the group
★ Concert #3 — Place de l'Horloge, Avignon (confirmed — Aix option dropped)
Train or drive back to Arles — dinner in Arles

days.notes: Last night in Arles. Group moves to Nice tomorrow.

legs.notes: ⚠️ DECISION: (a) Drive ~2.5-3h and RETURN RENTAL CAR IN NICE (one-way fee applies; Vieux Nice Airbnb has no parking — drop car at NCE airport or Nice Ville on arrival); or (b) drive 20 min to Avignon TGV, return car there, TGV Avignon→Nice direct ~3h (~€40-60 pp — book ahead, summer trains sell out). Checkout Arles 10 AM, Nice check-in ~3-4 PM.

segments.activity: Check out Le Mas Sivan (by 10 AM)
Optional stop en route (Cassis or Saint-Paul-de-Vence)
Check in — Charming 3BR Place Rossetti, Vieux Nice (booked)
Old Nice guided tour + Cours Saleya with the group (walk from Airbnb)
★ Concert #4 — Nice (confirmed final concert; walkable/tram from Vieux Nice)

days.label: Day 9 — Wednesday, August 5
days.theme: Group departs for Italy — visitors head home

legs.notes: Tram Line 2 to NCE (~25 min, ~€1.50 pp) or taxi ~€35. Flight ~12:10 PM — leave Vieux Nice by 9:30 AM. No booking needed.

segments.activity: Check out — tram/taxi to NCE airport
✈ United NCE → (connection) → EWR, arrives 3:40 PM (booked)
